title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Anarock Property Consultants
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Anarock Property Consultants in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Anarock Property Consultants:
Anarock Property Consultants is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anarock Property Consultants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
